query: SELECT status, qboSyncStatus, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(SUM(CAST(total AS DECIMAL(12,2))),2) as totalAmt FROM invoices GROUP BY status, qboSyncStatus ORDER BY status, qboSyncStatus;
